{| style="background-color: #8dfe8f; text-align: center;" cellpadding="10"
|'''Supreme Relics have not yet been included into this page.'''<br>Please visit the [[Supreme Relic]] page to see the complete list, prices, and resonances.
|}

{| class="wikitable filter-toggles"
|-
!View All
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected view-all" | [[#js|View All]]
<!--| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected true" | [[#js|Available Only]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected false" | [[#js|Unavailable Only]] !-->
|-
!AFFCT
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat1 fame" | [[#js|FAME]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat1 art" | [[#js|ART]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat1 fth" | [[#js|FTH]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat1 civ" | [[#js|CIV]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat1 tech" | [[#js|TECH]]
|-
!Grade  
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 sss" | [[#js|SSS]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 ss" | [[#js|SS]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 s" | [[#js|S]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 aaa" | [[#js|AAA]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 aa" | [[#js|AA]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 a" | [[#js|A]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 blue" | [[#js|Blue]]
| class="wds-button filter-toggle-not-selected cat2 green" | [[#js|Green]]
|}

{| class="wikitable sortable"
!Image
!Rank
!Effect (Maxed)
!FAME
!ART
!FTH
!CIV
!TECH
!Skill1
!Skill2
!Skill3
!Source
{{#cargo_query:table=Relics
|fields=name, source, affct, rank, ss3, ss7, fame, art, fth, civ, tech, source, skill1, skill2, skill3
|order by=name
|format=template
|template=RelicSourceTableRow
|named args=yes}}
|}
